[2018-03-04 01:11] strshplyr5046 (StrShPlyr): Shadowfangs for example.

[2018-03-04 01:12] iminabearsuit: The unit is just too awkward. The gold to tech ratio is all out of whack. There's some niche situations where you can get one off a centrifuge or chrono filter and it would be 100% busted. But in a "standard" set, it's hard to keep 3 engineers up when you need to spend so much tech.
[2018-03-04 01:12] iminabearsuit: The unit just doesn't really make much sense in how a standard prismata build looks.

[2018-03-04 01:12] punf: as in, its fun if im doing it and youre not and as a result i freelo

[2018-03-04 01:13] iminabearsuit: Assuming you use engineers for defensive tempo, which you should.
[2018-03-04 01:13] iminabearsuit: So in order to efficently use this unit, you're looking at an economy of 25 drones.

[2018-03-04 01:15] f300xen (f0x): no, this is a real person
[2018-03-04 01:15] apooche: Punf a while ago Llama suggested that as a mode of play, I think it would be legit still

--- Thread (50 messages, 2018-03-04) ---
[2018-03-04 01:33] punf: but theres more trash formatting than id like so a guide sounds nice
[2018-03-04 01:33] apooche: https://docs.google.com/document/d/1f_oztC_JRdGSkwPByauFQR9dtyWCLs1lxmsVOo-aJ9I/pub
[2018-03-04 01:33] apooche: unit formatting guide
[2018-03-04 01:34] apooche: The suggested format is as follows, leaving out any rows that do not apply:

Name (Cost, Supply) Health

Additional cost

Spell effect or On-purchase effect

Keywords

Turn start effect

Ability

Other effect


For example:

Tia Thurnax (6GGGR, 1 Supply) 4HP

As an additional cost to buy Tia Thurnax, consume 7 Drones.

Prompt, Fragile, Stamina 3

Click: Gain (X7)


or

Endotherm Kit (5GGRR, 1 Supply)

Spell: construct [4 Frostbites] with Buildtime 4, and construct [4 Cryo Rays] with Buildtime 4.
[2018-03-04 01:34] wilson0862 (Wilson): Can you put all that in the same comment.
[2018-03-04 01:34] punf: 5ggrr? god that guide is old
[2018-03-04 01:34] wilson0862 (Wilson): So I don't have to pin 3 lines, haha
[2018-03-04 01:35] apooche: I think when you go to the pin it lets you jump to that spot or something
[2018-03-04 01:35] apooche: so you would see it naturally

The suggested format is as follows, leaving out any rows that do not apply:

Name (Cost, Supply) Health

Additional cost

Spell effect or On-purchase effect

Keywords

Turn start effect

Ability

Other effect


For example:

Tia Thurnax (6GGGR, 1 Supply) 4HP

As an additional cost to buy Tia Thurnax, consume 7 Drones.

Prompt, Fragile, Stamina 3

Click: Gain (X7)


or

Endotherm Kit (5GGRR, 1 Supply)

Spell: construct [4 Frostbites] with Buildtime 4, and construct [4 Cryo Rays] with Buildtime 4.

Additional cost

Spell effect or On-purchase effect

Keywords

Turn start effect

Ability

Other effect

Tia Thurnax (6GGGR, 1 Supply) 4HP

As an additional cost to buy Tia Thurnax, consume 7 Drones.

Prompt, Fragile, Stamina 3

Click: Gain (X7)

Spell: construct [4 Frostbites] with Buildtime 4, and construct [4 Cryo Rays] with Buildtime 4.
